text:
これよ、これ！
高級食材なのよねぇー！

私も話に聞いたことがあるだけで
実物を見るのは初めてなの！
調理しがいがあるわぁー！

お店で売ってる値段ほどじゃないけど
多めにお礼を用意したつもりよ。

<%me>さん
いつもいつも本当にありがと

Now THIS is the prime stuff! Good luck finding
ingredients this good anywhere else!

I've never seen this stuff up close before--only
heard about people cooking with it. Ooh, I can't
wait to get it over the flame!

It's probably less than what you could get for
this stuff on the market, but I tried to give
your reward a little extra sweetener.

You've saved me over and over,
<%me>.
Thanks so much!
